hero.title: Global Freight Solutions Built Around Your Needs
hero.description: From ocean transportation to air cargo and supply chain management, SDC Shipping Freight provides reliable logistics solutions worldwide.

sea.title: Sea Freight
sea.description: Reliable ocean freight solutions including Full Container Load (FCL) and Less than Container Load (LCL) services connecting global ports.

air.title: Air Freight
air.description: Fast and secure international air cargo transportation with priority handling and customs coordination.

land.title: Land Transport
land.description: Efficient domestic and cross-border transportation supported by experienced logistics professionals and modern tracking solutions.

warehouse.title: Warehousing
warehouse.description: Secure storage, inventory management, distribution, and fulfillment solutions designed for efficient supply chains.

customs.title: Customs Clearance
customs.description: Professional customs coordination helping shipments move smoothly through international regulations.

forwarding.title: Freight Forwarding
forwarding.description: Complete shipment coordination from origin to destination with reliable global logistics partnerships.
